Package de.uka.ilkd.key.macros

Class ProofMacroFinishedInfo

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl.DefaultTaskFinishedInfo
de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.ProofMacroFinishedInfo
All Implemented Interfaces:
TaskFinishedInfo
public class ProofMacroFinishedInfo extends DefaultTaskFinishedInfo
An information object with additional information about the finished proof macro. The source is always a proof macro and the result is always a list of goals. This information is created and passed on by every application of a proof macro as for the passed listener(s) to deal with it.
